title: pelargonium × aurantiacum
intro: Pelargonium × aurantiacum, also known as Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × aurantiacum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
